textRun.content: verification run for the semantic-IR reconciler.
We want one initial markdown-only push to create as many supported Google Docs features as possible.
The goal is not just serialization. The goal is to prove that a future desired markdown document without live transport indices can still reconcile cleanly against the live Google Doc.
This is a plain blockquote that should remain a blockquote after re-pull.
It has two paragraphs to verify continuation handling.
The initial push creates the document shape in one cycle.
The follow-up push will make complex edits across most block types.
Re-pull and inspect the generated markdown.
The reconciler should preserve ordinary prose like this paragraph while also supporting structural markdown features in the same document.
If this round-trip holds, the markdown workflow is in much better shape for real authoring.
